raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The cup is directly in front-right of the boxes, well within the claw’s 10 cm gripping range and no other objects obstruct access from above.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and removed from its initial location, freeing the workspace in front of the boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table_front_right_clear_area",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the chosen spot on the front-right corner of the table is empty.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is released on the table’s front-right corner, safely away from the manipulation zone of the boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The front face of box_2 is fully exposed and the right side of the table has at least 15 cm of free space so the box can slide rightward without hitting the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is translated ~15 cm to the right, creating a clear lateral gap between box_1 and box_2 so they are no longer touching."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A lateral gap now exists around box_1, allowing both arms to approach its left and right faces simultaneously without interference from box_2 or the cup. The table area immediately above the box is unobstructed for a vertical lift.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is firmly grasped on its opposing side faces by both end-effectors, ready to be lifted from the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 5,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is currently held by both arms and clear space exists above the tabletop to lift it up.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is lifted approximately 10 cm above the tabletop, fully detached from the surface and other objects, completing the ‘pick-up’ task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is directly in front-right of the boxes, well within the claw’s 10 cm gripping range and no other objects obstruct access from above.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and removed from its initial location, freeing the workspace in front of the boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the chosen spot on the front-right corner of the table is empty.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is released on the table’s front-right corner, safely away from the manipulation zone of the boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: The front face of box_2 is fully exposed and the right side of the table has at least 15 cm of free space so the box can slide rightward without hitting the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is translated ~15 cm to the right, creating a clear lateral gap between box_1 and box_2 so they are no longer touching.

parsed_json.Precondition: A lateral gap now exists around box_1, allowing both arms to approach its left and right faces simultaneously without interference from box_2 or the cup. The table area immediately above the box is unobstructed for a vertical lift.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is firmly grasped on its opposing side faces by both end-effectors, ready to be lifted from the tabletop.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is currently held by both arms and clear space exists above the tabletop to lift it up.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is lifted approximately 10 cm above the tabletop, fully detached from the surface and other objects, completing the ‘pick-up’ task.
